core_payload.content:
# Symphony Workflow Contract

## 1. Role
Symphony Workflow Contract will become the richer repo-owned law surface for orchestration, binding workflow policy, instruction surfaces, harness behavior, and review boundaries into one explicit execution contract.

## 2. Future Workflow Contract
Workflow law will keep tracker, workspace, hooks, concurrency, Codex settings, and assignment-aware execution rules versioned in-repo. It will enforce stronger Dream-safe output discipline and cleaner alignment between harness protocol, workflow law, and downstream artifact return.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Autonomous coding quality will depend less on hidden operator memory and more on one visible repository-owned execution contract that every serious run can load and follow.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Symphony Workflow Contract supports To Dig Deep by keeping orchestration law explicit, legible, and shared.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Workflow Contract defines the future richer repo-owned law surface for orchestration: stronger instruction-surface integration, assignment-aware execution, stricter Dream-safe output discipline, and better alignment between workflow law, harness protocol, and artifact return.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
